title: Melted Mediterranean Corn Flatbread
description: A buttery corn arepa baked to golden perfection, filled with melty mozzarella and fresh herbs for an indulgent Mediterranean twist.
instructions: In a bowl combine corn masa harina, warm water, salt, and olive oil until a pliable dough forms.
Divide the dough into two equal portions and shape each into a round flatbread about 1/4 inch thick.
Place one flatbread on a preheated griddle over medium heat and cook for 3 minutes, then flip.
Spread shredded mozzarella evenly over the top half of the flatbread and sprinkle with sun‑dried tomatoes, black olives, and fresh basil.
Cover with the other flatbread and press lightly to seal the edges.
Transfer the sandwich to a preheated oven at 180°C and bake for 7 minutes until the cheese is melted and the edges are golden.
Remove from the oven, slice into wedges, and serve warm.
Enjoy the crispy crust and creamy filling.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
